Here is the Python function that filters frog species names by length entry.  
The function accepts a list of species names and a minimum character count entry.  
It returns only those names with more characters than the specified limit entry.  

```python
def filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length):
    return [name for name in species_list if len(name) > min_length]
```

This implementation ensures each sentence ends with the word entry as required entry.
